generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance SmartLightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled smart lighting system actuator configured within BIM for bidirectional communication with the digital twin, supporting adaptive lighting control policies based on real-time occupancy and environmental data."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuator modeled in BIM with runtime control logic, enabling dynamic adjustment of temperature/humidity settings through bidirectional communication with the digital twin."
]

instance MotorizedShadingSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motorized shading system integrated with the digital twin for automated adjustment based on solar radiation data, occupancy patterns, and visual comfort optimization algorithms."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "PIR-based occupancy sensor deployed across building zones transmitting real-time occupancy data to the digital twin via Eclipse Hono middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Photometric sensor measuring ambient light levels at various building locations, transmitting data to the digital twin for adaptive lighting control."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Combined temperature and humidity sensor network providing environmental data for HVAC system optimization and indoor air quality monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building energy consumption monitor tracking real-time electrical usage patterns at sub-system levels for predictive analytics and optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMonitor
]

instance DeviceStatusUpdatesTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SmartLightingActuator, HVACActuator, MotorizedShadingSystem
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model serving as the semantic backbone, enriched with device configurations, control logic, and spatial relationships for all physical components."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, ModelDrivenTransformationTool
]

instance RuntimeDeviceTwinModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stateful device twin model managed by Eclipse Ditto, storing real-time device status, configurations, and operational metadata."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based simulation model for energy consumption forecasting, occupancy prediction, and adaptive control policy optimization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEnabler
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5-based 3D visualization model providing interactive monitoring of building operations with real-time data overlay."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineEnabler
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data collected from PIR sensors, processed through Eclipse Hono and integrated into the digital twin for monitoring and analytics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature and humidity data transmitted from sensor networks, used for HVAC optimization and indoor environmental quality assessment."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HVACOptimizationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance EnergyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Building energy consumption data collected at sub-system levels, enabling real-time monitoring and predictive energy savings analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnergyOptimizationService, PostOccupancyAnalysisService
]

instance DeviceStatusData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time status updates from actuators and controllers, used for system health monitoring and automated fault detection."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DeviceStatusUpdatesTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CommissioningService, FaultDetectionService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware providing device management, telemetry ingestion, and protocol bridging (MQTT/CoAP) for all IoT sensor data transmission."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto platform enabling stateful device twin modeling and bidirectional communication between physical devices and their virtual counterparts."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceConfigurationService, AdaptiveControlService
]

instance ModelDrivenTransformationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tool automating the generation of runtime interfaces from BIM models to ensure semantic consistency between physical and virtual representations."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedDeploymentService, RuntimeConfigurationService
]

instance UnrealEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing real-time 3D visualization capabilities for immersive building operation monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework (BOREALIS project) enabling adaptive control policies for energy optimization and visual comfort enhancement."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing live building performance tracking including energy consumption, occupancy trends, and environmental conditions through the digital twin interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides LiveBuildingPerformanceInsight, OccupancyTrendInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating optimization recommendations through reinforcement learning models for energy consumption, lighting, and HVAC system tuning."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendationAction, LightingAdjustmentRecommendationAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing automated alerts for equipment failures or anomalies detected in sensor data through pattern recognition algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:provides EquipmentFailureAlertAction, AnomalyDetectionInsight
]

instance PostOccupancyAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing long-term trends in energy savings, user behavior patterns, and operational efficiency for strategic decision-making."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergySavingsTrendInsight, UserBehaviorPatternInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing interactive 3D visualization of building operations using Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingOperationVisualizationInsight
]

instance DeviceConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating the configuration of physical devices through runtime interfaces generated from BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceAutomationAction
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing dynamic adjustment of control policies based on real-time feedback from sensors and operational data."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveLightingThresholdAction, HVACPolicyAdjustmentAction
]

instance HVACOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service optimizing HVAC system performance based on environmental data and occupancy patterns."
    DTDFVocab:provides HVACPolicyAdjustmentAction
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing energy consumption optimization recommendations and predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendationAction
]

instance CommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating the commissioning and initial configuration of physical devices through the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceAutomationAction
]

instance AutomatedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling automated deployment of runtime interfaces and device configurations."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceAutomationAction
]

instance RuntimeConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing runtime configuration of the digital twin system and connected devices."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceAutomationAction
]

instance AdaptiveLightingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing adaptive lighting control policies based on real-time sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveLightingThresholdAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance LiveBuildingPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard showing current building performance metrics including energy consumption, occupancy levels, and environmental conditions."
]

instance OccupancyTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical and predictive analysis of occupancy patterns across different building zones and time periods."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated suggestions for energy consumption optimization based on predictive analytics models."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingAdjustmentRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Proposed adjustments to lighting systems based on occupancy patterns and visual comfort requirements."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EquipmentFailureAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alert system notifying facility managers of detected equipment failures or malfunctions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of unusual patterns in sensor data that may indicate potential system issues or operational inefficiencies."
]

instance EnergySavingsTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Long-term analysis of energy savings achieved through implemented optimization measures and operational changes."
]

instance UserBehaviorPatternInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of user behavior patterns affecting building operations including occupancy schedules and interaction with building systems."
]

instance BuildingOperationVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of current building operations with real-time data overlay for immersive monitoring and analysis."
]

instance DeviceAutomationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated configuration and deployment of physical devices based on BIM-derived control logic."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdaptiveLightingThresholdAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of lighting system thresholds based on real-time occupancy and environmental conditions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACPolicyAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated tuning of HVAC control policies to optimize energy use while maintaining comfort levels."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure containing all sensors, actuators, and IoT devices that interact with the digital twin."
    base:contains OccupancySensor, LightLevelSensor, TemperatureHumiditySensor, EnergyMonitor,
                SmartLightingActuator, HVACActuator, MotorizedShadingSystem
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual environment containing all models, data, and services that constitute the building digital twin system."
    base:contains BIMModel, RuntimeDeviceTwinModel, PredictiveAnalyticsModel,
                VisualizationModel, EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

// C1: System Under Study
instance BuildingDigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "BIM-based Digital Twin for building infrastructure focusing on real-time synchronization between physical assets and virtual models for life-cycle optimization."
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment, DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction enables the digital twin to **generate control signals and commands** for actuators and controllers in the physical system. This is achieved through **bidirectional communication protocols** (e.g., MQTT over Eclipse Hono/Ditto) where the DT processes **control logic, optimization algorithms, or user inputs** and transmits **actuation commands** (e.g., adjust lighting levels, trigger HVAC adjustments) back to the physical infrastructure. The framework supports **real-time feedback loops** for adaptive control systems, such as those implemented in the **BOREALIS project** for energy-efficient lighting."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale operates at **real-time and near-real-time intervals**, with synchronization frequencies determined by the **sampling rates of IoT sensors** (e.g., 1-second intervals for occupancy sensors, 5-minute intervals for energy monitors) and the **latency requirements of control systems** (e.g., sub-second for adaptive lighting). The framework ensures **low-latency data exchange** via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware**, with **Unreal Engine 5** providing **interactive visualization updates** at **60 FPS** for user interaction. Longer-term analytics (e.g., post-occupancy data analysis) operate at **hourly/daily scales** for optimization and trend analysis."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Model**: Central semantic foundation for **device modeling and control logic**.
   - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto Layer**: Handles **device connectivity, telemetry, and state management**.
   - **Control Logic Layer**: Implements **adaptive policies** (e.g., reinforcement learning for lighting optimization).
   - **Visualization Layer**: Provides **interactive 3D monitoring** via Unreal Engine 5.
   - **Extension Points**: Enable **custom services** (e.g., analytics, user interfaces) to be integrated without modifying core DT logic. The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across **multi-building infrastructures** via **modular twinning** and **standardized interfaces**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **all life-cycle stages** of the building, from **design (as-designed)** to **construction (as-manufactured)** and **operation (as-operated)**. During **design**, the BIM model is enriched with **device and control logic configurations**. In **construction**, the DT is **commissioned** via automated model-driven deployment. During **operation**, the DT **evolves dynamically** through **runtime data integration, adaptive control policies, and service extensions**. The framework supports **post-occupancy analysis** (e.g., BOREALIS project) to refine control strategies over time, ensuring **continuous alignment** between the digital and physical twins."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Model-Driven Validation**: BIM models are **validated** against **domain-specific schemas** (e.g., IFC standards) to ensure **semantic consistency**.
   - **Real-Time Synchronization**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** enforce **low-latency data exchange** with **error handling** for missing or corrupted telemetry.
   - **ODTE Metric**: The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement** metric evaluates **alignment between physical and virtual representations**, quantifying **semantic drift** and **operational fidelity**.
   - **Post-Occupancy Analysis**: **Reinforcement learning** (e.g., BOREALIS project) iteratively refines control policies, reducing **uncertainty** over time. **Uncertainty propagation** is managed via **statistical modeling** of sensor data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT is established via:
   - **Eclipse Hono** as the **device management and telemetry ingestion layer**, supporting **MQTT, CoAP, and HTTP protocols**.
   - **Eclipse Ditto** for **stateful device twin modeling** and **bidirectional communication** (e.g., MQTT over WebSockets).
   - **Unreal Engine 5** for **3D visualization**, connected to the DT via **custom middleware plugins** for **real-time data streaming**.
   - **Standardized APIs** (e.g., RESTful interfaces) for **service integration** and **cross-platform compatibility**. The architecture follows **service-oriented principles** with **modular interfaces** to ensure **scalability and interoperability**."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted in a **cloud-native, service-oriented architecture**, with:
   - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** deployed on **Kubernetes-based cloud platforms** (e.g., AWS, Azure) for **scalability and fault tolerance**.
   - **Unreal Engine 5** running on **high-performance GPUs** for **real-time rendering**.
   - **Model-driven deployment** automates **containerization** (e.g., Docker) and **orchestration** (e.g., Kubernetes) of DT components.
   - **On-premise deployment options** supported for **privacy-sensitive applications**, with **hybrid cloud capabilities** for **data residency compliance**. The framework ensures **low-latency performance** via **edge computing** for localized control systems."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is achieved through:
   - **Standardized middleware interfaces** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) enabling **seamless data exchange** with **third-party IoT platforms** (e.g., AWS IoT, Azure IoT Hub).
   - **BIM-based semantic mapping** allowing **interoperability with other AECO tools** (e.g., Revit, Navisworks).
   - **API-based connectivity** for **integration with enterprise systems** (e.g., CMMS, ERP) and **other digital twins** (e.g., city-scale DTs).
   - **Modular service architecture** supporting **plug-and-play integration** of **custom analytics, visualization, or control services**."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are managed as follows:
   - **Data ownership** is **shared between the building owner and DT service provider**, with **clear contractual agreements** defining **access rights** and **usage policies**.
   - **Privacy measures** include:
     - **Encryption** (TLS/SSL) for **data in transit** and **at rest**.
     - **Role-based access control (RBAC)** via **Eclipse Ditto** to restrict **sensitive data access**.
     - **Anonymization** of **occupancy data** for **privacy compliance** (e.g., GDPR).
     - **Data residency controls** to ensure **compliance with regional regulations** (e.g., EU GDPR, California CCPA)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
   - **BIM Standards**: **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** for **semantic interoperability** and **data exchange** between BIM tools.
   - **IoT Standards**: **OMA LwM2M** (Lightweight M2M) for **device management** and **telemetry protocols**.
   - **Middleware Standards**: **Eclipse Hono** (for device connectivity) and **Eclipse Ditto** (for device twin modeling) comply with **OASIS IoT standards**.
   - **Control Systems**: **BACnet** and **KNX** for **building automation integration**.
   - **API Standards**: **RESTful APIs** and **MQTT v3.1.1** for **interoperable communication**.
   - **Visualization Standards**: **Unreal Engine 5** follows **OpenGL/Vulkan** for **cross-platform rendering compatibility**."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
   - **Authentication and Authorization**: **OAuth 2.0** and **JWT tokens** for **secure access control** via Eclipse Hono/Ditto.
   - **Network Security**: **TLS 1.3** for **encrypted communication**, **firewall rules** for **traffic isolation**, and **DDoS protection** for middleware layers.
   - **Data Integrity**: **Digital signatures** and **checksum validation** to prevent **man-in-the-middle attacks**.
   - **Safety Mechanisms**:
     - **Fail-safe control policies** to **prevent hazardous operations** (e.g., emergency shutdowns for HVAC failures).
     - **Redundancy and failover** in **middleware and visualization layers** to ensure **continuous operation**.
     - **Remote operation safeguards**: **Human-in-the-loop validation** for **critical control actions** (e.g., emergency lighting overrides) to mitigate **unintended physical harm**.
   - **Compliance**: Adherence to **ISO/IEC 27001** for **information security management** and **NIST SP 800-53** for **cybersecurity controls**."
]
